name: Borscht Energy Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Beet – scrubbed and cut into chunks
1 medium Kirby cucumber – cut into chunks
1 medium Green bell pepper – seeded and coarsely chopped
1 Lemon – peeled, halved and seeds removed
1 Ripe avocado – peeled, stone removed and quartered
2 cups Vegetable stock – OR - Vegetarian bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse the beet, carrot, cucumber, bell pepper, and lemon until finely chopped in a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Add the avocado, spinach, alfalfa sprouts, dill, liquid aminos, and black pepper to the food processor.
3. With the machine running, gradually add the vegetable stock (or vegetable bouillon) and process until smooth.
4. Transfer the soup to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate until chilled for at least 2 hours.
5. Serve the soup in individual bowls, garnishing each with alfalfa sprouts.
